title: Collania glaucescens
taxonomy: Collania glaucescens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This family, commonly known as the bellflower family, includes over 2,000 species of plants. Collania glaucescens is native to the Andes mountain range in South America. It belongs to the genus Collania, which contains a small number of species. The classification of Collania glaucescens reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Campanulaceae family.
